routineTasks.title: EE Lab Utilization
routineTasks.body: Monthly EE Lab utilization report for June 2026 prepared and attached.

routineTasks.title: Startup & Equipment Coordination
routineTasks.body: Coordinated equipment pickup from EE Lab based on startup requests.
routineTasks.bullets:
Formal request required specifying items, purpose, and timeframe.
2 items & accessories to be returned by 11-10-2026.

routineTasks.title: Delegate & Visitor Data Management
routineTasks.body: Continued management of delegate and visitor data. Updated to 12th June 2026.

projectTasks.title: CShine – Tech Prowess Team (TPT)
projectTasks.body: Designed TPT registration form, live funnel report, and PIN-protected admin panel across 5 problem statements.

projectTasks.title: Startup Quarterly Questionnaire Follow-up
projectTasks.body: Bulk email campaign completed across all 82 incubated startups.
projectTasks.bullets:
Initial: 82 · Follow-Up: 82 · Reminders: 164 · Thank-You: 55
Responses: 58/82 as on 06-6-26.
Full automation ready on 3 days notice.

projectTasks.title: KLE-TU Research Facilities Portal
projectTasks.body: Consolidated research facilities from all KLE-TU departments. Last updated 14 March 2026.

projectTasks.title: CTIE Invoice Automation System
projectTasks.body: Deployed in-house invoice automation replacing manual billing for 34 startups.

projectTasks.title: SIFS Details
projectTasks.body: Retrieved past records (Oct-2024) and shared the requested SIFS details.

projectTasks.title: TrueNAS SCALE – NAS for CTIE Office
projectTasks.body: Reinitiated stalled NAS storage works. Details shared. Awaiting inputs.
projectTasks.bullets:
CTIE Office not on KLE Campus LAN — IT Infocell to bridge.
Last communication: 27 March 2026.

projectTasks.title: KLE-CTIE Event Performance Dashboard
projectTasks.body: Integrated Event Reports Dashboard with Google Drive and GitHub Pages via GAS. Hundreds of records across FY 2015–16 to 2022–23.
projectTasks.bullets: Custom GAS auto-gallery engine for event-specific image linking.

projectTasks.title: KLE-CTIE EE Lab Inventory Portal
projectTasks.body: "Spark" animated avatar with Indian English neural voice narration. PO/Invoice integration in progress.
projectTasks.bullets:
55+ instruments across 14 categories documented.
PO/Invoice detail integration in progress.

summary: Routine lab management continued alongside progress on digital infrastructure. Key achievements: Event Dashboard integrated; TrueNAS SCALE reinitiated; SIFS details shared; Inventory portal maintained with Spark audio guide.
focus: Digital archival · Process automation · Startup support · Infrastructure reactivation · Inventory documentation
